title: Hierarchical Data Structures and Their Applications
description: A flowchart categorizing common data structures based on their hierarchical properties and showing their primary real-world applications.
elements: Tree Structures (Binary Trees, Heaps, BST, AVL, B-Trees)
relationships: Linear structures are foundational for implementing more complex structures
Tree structures are specialized for efficient search and ordering
Graph structures model complex relationships and networks
Hash-based structures provide fastest access for key-value pairs
